hooks.command: echo "PROJECT DOC MAP — read the relevant docs BEFORE responding. If you have not read them in this session, read them now via Read tool. AUDIT / VALIDATION / RULES / EXCEPTIONS / ERRORS: docs/OPERATIONS/AUDIT_DATA_ERROR_REFERENCE.md + AUDIT-SYSTEM.md + EMBEDDED_RULES_TRANSLATION.md + VALIDATION_RULES_REFERENCE.md. PRICING: docs/OPERATIONS/PRICING_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md. SYNC: docs/OPERATIONS/AUTO-SYNC-GUIDE.md + docs/TECHNICAL/SYNC_SYSTEM_TECHNICAL.md. OPENINGS / CAPACITY / SPOTS: docs/OPERATIONS/OPENINGS_CAPACITY_FEATURE.md. SCHEMA / DATABASE: docs/TECHNICAL/DATABASE_COMPLETE_SCHEMA.md + database/README.md. UI / DESIGN / COLORS: docs/TECHNICAL/DESIGN_COLOR_SCHEME.md. VISION / ROADMAP / SAAS: docs/OPERATIONS/NEW_ERRORS_COMMAND_CENTER_VISION.md + PRODUCT_VISION_MULTI_SPORT_AI_SETUP.md + FUTURE_PLANS_REFERENCE.md. Anything else: check docs/INDEX.md FIRST. NEVER propose solutions without reading the relevant doc(s) IN THIS SESSION. If unsure which doc applies, read docs/INDEX.md."
